content:
🚀 librepods | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling advanced AirPods features on non-Apple devices.
✨ Key Features: • Noise Control Modes • Ear Detection • Battery Status • Head Gestures • Conversational Awareness
📖 Summary: LibrePods aims to liberate Apple AirPods features from the Apple ecosystem, enabling users to access premium functionalities like noise control, ear detection, and battery status on non-Apple devices, primarily Android and Linux.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
